name: suede_video_generation
description: Suede Labs lightweight video generation for agents and creators who need an inexpensive short clip without the higher-end cinematic, meme, or product-showcase video tiers. Generates a short 4-30 second clip from a text prompt in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1, returned with a Suede share URL and a provenance fingerprint that resolves through the Suede IP Registry on Base. Ideal for quick ad cuts, social-post backgrounds, music-video previz, lyric video B-roll, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows where cost-per-call matters more than maximum cinematic quality.

prompt.description: Narrative or visual prompt to drive the video. Include subject, scene, motion, camera style, and mood.

seed.description: Optional random seed for reproducible renders.

examples.prompt: A vertical 9:16 8-second clip of neon city skyline pulsing to a synthwave beat, slow camera push-in.
